sections.paragraph:
κύθρα, ας, ἡ (Ionic and later Gk. for χύτρος [χέω]; Herodas 7, 76; Etym. Mag. p. 454, 43; PTebt 112, 42; 47, 75 [112 b.c.]; PAmh 125, 5; s. Mayser p. 184. For the LXX s. Thackeray p. 103) a pot 1 Cl 17:6 (quot. of unknown origin; s. RHarris, JBL 29, 1910, 190f).—DELG s.v. χέω III.

Gk. Gk. = Greek

Herodas Herodas , a.k.a. Herondas, III b.c.—List 5

Mag.

Mag. = De Magistratibus Populi Romani

mag. = magic(al)

PTebt PTebt = The Tebtunis Papyri—List 4

PAmh PAmh = The Amherst Papyri I–II—List 4

Mayser Mayser = EM., Grammatik der griechischen Papyri aus der Ptolemäerzeit—Lists 4, 6

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

Thackeray Thackeray = HT., A Grammar of the OT in Greek according to the Septuagint—List 6

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

quot. quot. = quotation

JBL JBL = Journal of Biblical Literature—List 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 574
